description_long: This skateboard features a standard popsicle-shaped deck with a black grip tape surface covering the top, providing traction for the rider. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, visible along the side profile, with a natural wood finish on the edges. The skateboard is equipped with two metal trucks, each mounted with a pair of small, hard wheels, likely made of polyurethane, suitable for street or park use. The wheels are a neutral gray color and lack any visible branding or markings. There are no visible graphics or artwork on the underside or top of the deck, giving it a minimalist appearance. The hardware, such as bolts and nuts, is subtly visible on the top surface, securing the trucks to the deck.
description: A minimalist skateboard with a black grip tape deck, natural wood edges, and gray street wheels mounted on metal trucks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the skateboard, black grip tape on top, natural wood edges, and both sets of wheels and trucks.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the rounded nose or tail, black grip tape, and the layered wood construction along the edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the full deck, grip tape, and both trucks and wheels.
description_view_3: End view from the opposite side, showing the rounded end, grip tape, and wood layering.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small, gray, no visible markings or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard kingpin, silver metal, no visible branding, classic shape
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern or graphics
